title: IPA assembly for Hifi PacBio reads
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4cpmf","text":"This protocol is regarding the assembly of plant genomes using HiFi data (PacBio Sequel II) using Improved Phase Assembly (IPA) tool.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"c0p00","text":"Requirements to use IPA assembly: ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4b9vs","text":"1) CCS.bam files, from PacBio sequel II.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9bt3d","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6bm58","text":"2) Install IPA tool using the link provided below:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dqvr4","text":"https://github.com/PacificBiosciences/pbipa","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":43}],"data":{}},{"key":"9ko2v","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f4hnh","text":"3) We performed the genome assembly in \"High performance computing (HPC)\" system, at University of Queensland, using following commands: ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4qjub","text":"$ conda create --prefix /mnt/beegfs/usr/ipaM","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9dbal","text":"$ conda activate /mnt/beegfs/usr/ipaM","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5235a","text":"$ conda install pbipa","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b9uqk","text":"$ ipa validate","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6paup","text":"$ ipa local --nthreads 24 --njobs 1 -i m64123_200919_084320.ccs.bam -i m64123_201004_151034.ccs.bam","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7rda3","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"E3BCF556B2BB11EB894D0A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://github.com/PacificBiosciences/pbipa"}}}}
steps: Steps to generate the genome assembly of different plant species using IPA (Improved phased assembly): 1) ccs.bam files generated by PacBio Sequel II (Hifi) platform for all the plant species were used to assemble the genome using IPA tool. 2) IPA was installed 2) IPA was initiated using Conda environment
Above screen shot shows the commands used for using IPA, using Conda environment.
creator: Priyanka Sharma
